content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
NEUTRAL regime — normal volatility (Vol: 26.6%) but extremely narrow participation with breadth 0/8 sectors positive; market momentum is deteriorating even without a volatility spike.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Energy & Chemicals is the least weak and leading on relative terms: Energy & Chemicals (1W: -3.95% | 1M: -0.10%) — BELOW TREND. Holding & Investment is second-best by performance: Holding & Investment (1W: -6.04% | 1M: -8.29%) — BELOW TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Banking & Finance is the clear laggard: Banking & Finance (1W: -15.03% | 1M: -9.31%) — BELOW TREND. Technology & Telecom is also underperforming: Technology & Telecom (1W: -9.92% | 1M: -12.77%) — BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
TUPRS (1W: +18.08% | 1M: +13.91%) — ABOVE TREND; PETKM (1W: +6.42% | 1M: +3.08%) — ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +3.57% | 1M: +17.02%) — ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +2.57% | 1M: -9.79%) — RECOVERY; CCOLA (1W: -1.12% | 1M: -4.28%) — BELOW TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
ENKAI (1W: -11.90% | 1M: -6.76%) — BELOW TREND; TTKOM (1W: -13.02% | 1M: -12.64%) — BELOW TREND; TRMET (1W: -13.21% | 1M: +12.87%) — CORRECTION; EREGL (1W: -13.66% | 1M: -1.74%) — BELOW TREND; TRALT (1W: -15.08% | 1M: +12.41%) — CORRECTION.

6. Momentum Stocks?
TUPRS (1W: +18.08% | 1M: +13.91%) — ABOVE TREND; YKBNK (1W: -18.34% | 1M: -7.58%) — BELOW TREND; AKBNK (1W: -17.86% | 1M: -12.26%) — BELOW TREND; ISCTR (1W: -15.91% | 1M: -14.23%) — BELOW TREND; TRALT (1W: -15.08% | 1M: +12.41%) — CORRECTION.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking is under pressure across the board; GARAN (1W: -15.37% | 1M: -12.18%) — BELOW TREND, AKBNK (1W: -17.86% | 1M: -12.26%) — BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -15.91% | 1M: -14.23%) — BELOW TREND; risk of further downside on margin and FX given sentiment.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy Industry is mixed: ASELS (1W: +3.57% | 1M: +17.02%) — ABOVE TREND while EREGL (1W: -13.66% | 1M: -1.74%) — BELOW TREND and ARCLK (1W: -5.38% | 1M: -9.92%) — BELOW TREND, suggesting idiosyncratic winners amid broad weakness.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Energy shows idiosyncratic leadership: TUPRS (1W: +18.08% | 1M: +13.91%) — ABOVE TREND and PETKM (1W: +6.42% | 1M: +3.08%) — ABOVE TREND, but TRMET (1W: -13.21% | 1M: +12.87%) — CORRECTION and OYAKC (1W: -4.08% | 1M: -9.34%) — BELOW TREND keep sector risk elevated.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Neutral stance: trim cyclicals and crowded bank/tech names, maintain selective exposure to high-conviction standouts (TUPRS, ASELS, PETKM) with tighter stops and raise cash/hedge as breadth is nil and downside risk is asymmetric.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
TUPRS (1W: +18.08% | 1M: +13.91%) — ABOVE TREND; ASELS (1W: +3.57% | 1M: +17.02%) — ABOVE TREND; AKBNK (1W: -17.86% | 1M: -12.26%) — BELOW TREND; TTKOM (1W: -13.02% | 1M: -12.64%) — BELOW TREND; ENKAI (1W: -11.90% | 1M: -6.76%) — BELOW TREND.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Banking & Finance for contagion and liquidity-driven moves, Energy & Chemicals for idiosyncratic rallies/mean reversion, and Technology & Telecom for risk-off flows.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Monitor XU100 for failure below the recent short-term low (risk expansion) or a decisive break above the near-term high (momentum recovery); catalysts include CBT communications, CPI prints, USD/TRY swings, and upcoming earnings/flows in bank and energy names.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Neutral regime with normal volatility but zero sector breadth — risk is concentrated and participation is narrow. TUPRS and ASELS are standouts; banks and tech are weakest and should be trimmed or hedged while selectively adding to confirmed winners with strict risk controls.
